appliedUpdates.description: backend-api healthcheck at http://localhost:8000/health returns healthy status

evidence: Created session via POST /api/sessions - returned id and intro state
Added message via POST /api/sessions/{id}/messages - state transitioned to active, AI response returned
Listed sessions via GET /api/sessions - returned user's sessions in order
Got session detail via GET /api/sessions/{id} - returned full session with messages
Ended session via POST /api/sessions/{id}/end - state transitioned to concluded, summary auto-generated

testedVia: API testing via curl commands against running backend on port 8000
